name: Hillary Clinton
subject: If you're not with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
Right now, more than ever, I need your support | Friend --

For the first time in this race, we're being outraised.

We were already facing an uphill battle heading into the New Hampshire primary on Tuesday, where we're being outspent on TV and are down in the polls. Now we've learned that Senator Sanders' campaign outraised us by $5 million last month.

**I just finished tonight’s debate, and I want to know that I have your support. If you're able, chip in $1 to help close the gap right now:**
| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQ2NDk5OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwODk4MDQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQ2NDk5OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwODk4MDQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you,

Hillary

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjQ2NDk5OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwODk4MDQyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ2NDk5OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwODk4MDQyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQ2NDk5OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwODk4MDQyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQ2NDk5OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwODk4MDQyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQ2NDk5OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwODk4MDQyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQ2NDk5OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwODk4MDQyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQ2NDk5OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwODk4MDQyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQ2NDk5OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwODk4MDQyS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQ2NDk5OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwODk4MDQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQ2NDk5OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwODk4MDQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: "Big ideas"
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
When we started our campaign, we were down 44 points in New Hampshire. Tonight, just four days away from the state's primary, our political revolution has a real chance to win.
If you watched tonight's debate, you saw the important differences between our visions for America. As I said in the debate, **I believe what is required in this moment is to think big.**
I believe that we can provide health care for every man, woman, and child in this country. I believe that we can create an economy that works for everyone, and not just a handful of wealthy elites. And I believe that we can put an end to millionaires and billionaires buying our candidates and elections.
But we have to do well in New Hampshire if we're going to move that vision forward. So I have to ask directly:
[**Can I count on you to contribute $3 to our campaign ahead of Tuesday's New Hampshire primary? It is a critical state for our campaign, so your contribution right now is more important than ever before.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/against-all-odds?refcode=em160204-e "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/against-all-odds?refcode=em160204-e")
A few days ago, the people of Iowa showed that, against all odds, our political revolution has a chance to win this election. I don't take money from millionaires and billionaires. There is no super PAC waiting in the wings. But I know that if we stand together, I believe we can do even better in New Hampshire next week.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/against-all-odds?refcode=em160204-e "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/against-all-odds?refcode=em160204-e")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Rick Tyler
subject: #CruzCrew Daily Briefing
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

In New Hampshire,
families are coming to meet Ted Cruz because they want the next
president to be a leader they can trust. Ted Cruz is a proven
conservative who will fight for Americans' freedom - both at home
and abroad. He's not afraid to stand up to the Washington Cartel,
and he will never back down from terrorists; he will defeat them.

Ted Cruz will serve
the working men and women who are ready to restore freedom,
prosperity, and security. In 2016, we've raised more than $10
million - from 182,000 contributions with the amount averaging
$55.00 - because the people of the Granite State and across this
country are uniting behind the Cruz campaign to take back our
country.

Best,

Rick Tyler
Communications
Director
www.tedcruz.org

CRUZ NEWS

Breitbart: Ted Cruz
has Raised $3 Million Since Iowa Caucus

Denton
Record-Chronicle: Ted Cruz invokes Reagan in N.H.

The Blaze: Newsboys
Lead Singer Michael Tait Endorses Ted Cruz

Rush Limbaugh: Forces
Align to Assault the First Hispanic-American to Win a
Presidential Primary

Right Scoop: BOOM!
Ted Cruz releases NEW AD showing Jimmy Carter choosing TRUMP!

ON THE AIR TODAY

10:15 am ET: Bob
Smith on FOX NEWS

4:30 pm ET: A
Conversation with Ted Cruz and Empower Texans - WATCH LIVE

5 pm ET: Victoria
Coates on BLOOMBERG TV

10 pm ET: Bob
Smith on CNN

VIDEOS

Jimmy Carter: I Would
Choose Trump

Rick Tyler on CNN

TWEET

RT the news! @tedcruz
has raised $3 million since winning the #IACaucus:
http://bit.ly/1nRCJ40

Jimmy Carter chooses
@realDonaldTrump. I choose @tedcruz - RT if you do too!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=F1tIH5XhXa0 #CruzCrew

Check out @tedcruz's
latest endorsement: http://bit.ly/1T2onu7

I #ChooseCruz, and
you should too! Commit to vote for @tedcruz here: votetedcruz.com

POST ON FACEBOOK

SHARE the news! Ted
Cruz has raised $3 million since winning the #IACaucus:
http://bit.ly/1nRCJ40

Jimmy Carter chooses
Donald Trump. I #ChooseCruz - SHARE if you do too!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=F1tIH5XhXa0

Check out Ted Cruz's
latest endorsement: http://bit.ly/1T2onu7

I #ChooseCruz, and
you should too! Commit to vote for Ted Cruz here: votetedcruz.com

PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

name: Governor Charlie Baker, Massachusetts
subject: I'm on Team Christie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Peter,
Today I'm announcing my support and endorsement for my good friend Governor Chris Christie for President.
As a fellow governor, I know first hand we need a strong and tested executive to lead our country, especially one who has been so effective leading a blue state with conservative reforms.**Right now, our country is in dire need of someone with that experience and leadership and I know that Governor Christie's the right man for the job.**
[**I encourage you to please join me and make a donation to his campaign today by clicking here.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46091835:JfsifKrNu:m:1:1516426255:25C5F1EB5E08BE582BA1A21FD13D5F0C:r)
The New Hampshire primary is just days away and we need to get behind him, [**so please make a generous donation here.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46091835:JfsifKrNu:m:1:1516426255:25C5F1EB5E08BE582BA1A21FD13D5F0C:r)
I've gotten to know Chris very well over the years and know he is exactly the type of leader we need in Washington to lead the fight.
To Victory,
Charlie Baker
Governor, Massachusetts

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46091836:JfsifKrNu:m:1:1516426255:25C5F1EB5E08BE582BA1A21FD13D5F0C:r)

name: Bob Dees, Chairman
subject: Really encouraging news from Carson HQ
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33354467:Wqua-sCGN:m:1:876315805:FDCF458AAE2332E2B0A8A283270D45F7:r)
---

Peter,

Monday night was a rough night, as the Cruz campaign spread false rumors to voters across Iowa that Dr. Carson was pulling out of the race, and instructed them to vote for Senator Cruz.

[You can listen to one of the deceptive voicemails here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33354468:Wqua-sCGN:m:1:876315805:FDCF458AAE2332E2B0A8A283270D45F7:r).

But here's the really encouraging news -- since Monday night, people from all across the country have rushed to our defense and **_we are now on track to raise an astounding $1 million by Saturday night's debate in New Hampshire_**. Peter, this is a big deal.

**Right now, we only need roughly 4,738 more grassroots donations to hit our goal.

[Will you make a small donation of just $2 right now to help us get there?](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33354467:Wqua-sCGN:m:1:876315805:FDCF458AAE2332E2B0A8A283270D45F7:r) **

Let's send a message to both the media and our competitors that we won't be silenced.

Dr. Carson knows that we are seeing a big surge of support, but before he takes the stage at the ABC News debate on Saturday night, I would really like to tell him that we hit $1 million. And Peter, I'd love for him to know that you helped us get there.

Bringing accountability and integrity to Washington and returning power to "We the People" is a massive undertaking, but it's the right thing to do. And Dr. Carson is the right leader for the job.

As our campaign moves into New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada, your donation will ensure that we have the resources to fight back against the dirty tricks of the political class.

[**I humbly ask you to help out by making a secure donation of just $2 right now.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33354467:Wqua-sCGN:m:1:876315805:FDCF458AAE2332E2B0A8A283270D45F7:r)

Thank you for everything. You are the heart and soul of this campaign.

Respectfully,

Bob Dees
Chairman
Ben Carson for President**

**
| | | **
** [****](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33354467:Wqua-sCGN:m:1:876315805:FDCF458AAE2332E2B0A8A283270D45F7:r)** ** [****](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33354469:Wqua-sCGN:m:1:876315805:FDCF458AAE2332E2B0A8A283270D45F7:r)** **

---

Carson America, Inc | P.O. Box 26261 | Alexandria, VA 22313**

name: Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager
subject: Two quick updates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

1\. We launched a new TV ad in New Hampshire this morning sharing Gov. Kasich's positive message.

As we've risen in the polls, other candidates have spent more than a million dollars attacking us. **The Jeb, Christie and Rubio teams are running misleading ads** about Gov. Kasich's record of accomplishment in Ohio!

**[Please watch our new ad and chip in $25, $50 or more right now](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33355745:WtR5dsCmN:m:1:958431888:20C5EC7C34DED829F8B852F5A160DA6C:r)**[ to help us keep this on the air through Election Day!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33355745:WtR5dsCmN:m:1:958431888:20C5EC7C34DED829F8B852F5A160DA6C:r)

[
](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33355745:WtR5dsCmN:m:1:958431888:20C5EC7C34DED829F8B852F5A160DA6C:r)

2\. In case you missed it, Gov. Kasich will be [participating in a live tele-town hall event with Gov. Arnold Schwarzenegger](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33355746:WtR5dsCmN:m:1:958431888:20C5EC7C34DED829F8B852F5A160DA6C:r) on Friday, Feb. 5th (TONIGHT) at 8:15PM EST. Sign up to participate right now!

**RSVP at:** [JohnKasich.com/ArnoldTownHall](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33355746:WtR5dsCmN:m:1:958431888:20C5EC7C34DED829F8B852F5A160DA6C:r)
[
](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33355746:WtR5dsCmN:m:1:958431888:20C5EC7C34DED829F8B852F5A160DA6C:r)

After signing up, will you please help us promote this event by sharing it on Twitter and Facebook?

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33355747:WtR5dsCmN:m:1:958431888:20C5EC7C34DED829F8B852F5A160DA6C:r)
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33355748:WtR5dsCmN:m:1:958431888:20C5EC7C34DED829F8B852F5A160DA6C:r)

Election Day in New Hampshire is on Tuesday. Now is our chance to show America that we're ready for a candidate with a positive message about the future of our great country.

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33355745:WtR5dsCmN:m:1:958431888:20C5EC7C34DED829F8B852F5A160DA6C:r)

Thank you for your support!

-Beth

**Beth Hansen
**Campaign Manager
[ JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33355745:WtR5dsCmN:m:1:958431888:20C5EC7C34DED829F8B852F5A160DA6C:r)

clean_body: www.JohnKasich.com 1\. We launched a new TV ad in New Hampshire this morning sharing Gov. Kasich's positive message. Kasich's record of accomplishment in Ohio! 2\. In case you missed it, Gov. Kasich will be on Friday, Feb. 5th (TONIGHT) at 8:15PM EST. Sign up to participate right now! RSVP at: After signing up, will you please help us promote this event by sharing it on Twitter and Facebook? Election Day in New Hampshire is on Tuesday. name: Chairman Matt Borges
subject: Ted Strickland is having a "Tough Time"
body:
| [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2F6_doJf7CtJQ&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tough_time2&n=1) Peter, Have you seen the new web video from the Portman campaign? 2016 has not been kind to Ted Strickland. Democrats and the media have called Ted "disappointing" and "invisible," and he's been criticized for "not speaking to any of the issues." And next week, his primary opponent's SuperPAC will begin airing ads attacking Ted on TV across Ohio. "Tough Time" highlights Ted Strickland's failing campaign and his refusal to discuss his record and failed policies that hurt Ohio families. You can click [here](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3D6_doJf7CtJQ%26feature%3Dyoutu.be&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tough_time2&n=2) to watch the new ad. [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2F6_doJf7CtJQ&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tough_time2&n=3) [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fhrefshare.com%2F56e29&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tough_time2&n=4) [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fhrefshare.com%2Fcb0a&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tough_time2&n=5) Ohio voters remember what it was like under Ted Strickland when our state lost over 350,000 jobs and ranked 48th in job creation. There's a clear choice in this election: a return to the failed policies of Retread Ted's Ohio, or Rob's vision for a brighter future with better wages and a safer America. National Democrats have said the road to the White House and the Senate Majority runs through Ohio -- and that's why we need to make sure everyone knows that Ohio can't afford to go back to Retread Ted's Ohio. Please watch the new ad and share this video to help the campaign reach their goal of getting 100,000 views on "Tough Time" before the end of next week! Sincerely, Chairman Matt Borges [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tough_time2&n=6)[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tough_time2&n=7)[

](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/get_on_the_wall?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tough_time2&n=8)
---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tough_time2&n=9). -=-=-

And next week, his primary opponent's SuperPAC will begin airing ads attacking Ted on TV across Ohio. name: Joe Sestak
subject: It isn't safe
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171900c/3476a20e/c5e224e/2744dfe6/2311927701/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, I learned in the Navy that you can only expect what you inspect. If you want to do something, ensure you do it right, or people will suffer - and I'm about people. **It 's why I was for a moratorium on Marcellus shale fracking in 2010, and it's why I remain in support of it now** - as I reaffirmed during the first televised debate of this Senate race (video below). | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171900c/3476a20e/c5e224e/2744dfe5/2311927701/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0205FBb1&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250,500")
---

[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171900c/3476a20e/c5e224e/2744dfe4/2311927701/VEsF/ "https://youtu.be/ur6X7Us1S9s")
---
Pennsylvanians know the above Navy lesson from the demise of the anthracite coal industry, where the Commonwealth was left with a $15 billion cleanup of 2,500 miles of damaged streams and 250,000 acres of contaminated land because of the lack of adequate regulation and proper oversight.
Help me fight to ensure that poor planning on shale fracking does not continue to result in poor water quality with damage to natural lands, local roads, and infrastructure **by contributing today -- $5, $10, $20.16 or $50!**
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171900c/3476a20e/c5e224e/2744dfe3/2311927701/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0205FBb2&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250,500")
---
Warmly,
Joe

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171900c/3476a20e/c5e224e/2744dfe2/2311927701/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/joesestak")[
](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171900c/3476a20e/c5e224e/2744dfe1/2311927701/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=Footer")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171900c/3476a20e/c5e224e/2744dfe0/2311927701/VEsB/ "http://joesestak.com/") |
---|---|---
| Friends of Joe Sestak
P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | [Unsubscribe](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171900c/3476a20e/c5e224e/2744dfef/2311927701/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.joesestak.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") |

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Are you in my corner today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
outraised by $5 million | Friend --

We just learned that the Sanders campaign raised $5 million more than ours did in January, and they raised another $3 million in a single day after the Iowa caucus.

I'm proud of the campaign we're running -- I'm committed to standing with you to make life better for American families, and I'm ready to fight by your side to earn every vote, take on the Republicans, win the White House, and make history.

But if we don't win this nomination, we'll never get the chance to do those things. Now, with four days until the New Hampshire primary, show me you’re with me. **All I need is $1 to know you 're here on this team, fighting in my corner, ready to do what it takes to win:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQ2NTM4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwOTk1NTUxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQ2NTM4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwOTk1NTUxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Hillary

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjQ2NTM4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwOTk1NTUxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ2NTM4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwOTk1NTUxS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQ2NTM4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwOTk1NTUxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQ2NTM4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwOTk1NTUxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQ2NTM4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwOTk1NTUxS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQ2NTM4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwOTk1NTUxS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQ2NTM4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwOTk1NTUxS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQ2NTM4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwOTk1NTUxS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQ2NTM4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwOTk1NTUxS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQ2NTM4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwOTk1NTUxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: ⌛We have 24 hours⌛
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46099928:Jkc75KrNr:m:1:1349778030:235A00C598F436A0F726BFF2040D9551:r)
---
| | | | Peter, $240,000 in 24 hours. That's the goal our campaign has set out to raise before tomorrow night's debate.
[**Peter, will you chip in $24 right now to help us get there?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46099928:Jkc75KrNr:m:1:1349778030:235A00C598F436A0F726BFF2040D9551:r)
---
| | [**> >>> CHIP IN $24 <<<<<**
**dpwillis67@gmail.com** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46099928:Jkc75KrNr:m:1:1349778030:235A00C598F436A0F726BFF2040D9551:r)
---
| We are just days away from the New Hampshire primary, and what happens at tomorrow night's debate will set the stage for Tuesday's all-important Primary Election. Peter, tomorrow night most of the attacks will be coming my way. **All of my opponents know that our campaign is the biggest threat to their success.** They know that we are garnering the support of more Americans every minute, and they are going to throw every attack possible our way to see us defeated. [**I need your help to fight back. I 'm emailing you today because if we are able to raise $240,000 before I step on the debate stage, it will send a strong message to my opponents, and the media as well, that we're going to win this thing.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46099928:Jkc75KrNr:m:1:1349778030:235A00C598F436A0F726BFF2040D9551:r)
We have just about 24 hours before the debate begins. Will you chip in before it does?
---
| | [**> >>> CHIP IN $24 <<<<<**
**dpwillis67@gmail.com** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46099928:Jkc75KrNr:m:1:1349778030:235A00C598F436A0F726BFF2040D9551:r)
---
| Peter, I know the next ten months are going to be grueling but, Peter, our nation is worth it. I wouldn't be doing this if I didn't truly believe that America deserves a better leader. I know that with your urgent help today, we will be successful in November and finally take our country back. **[I hope I can count on you before I step on the debate stage tomorrow night.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46099928:Jkc75KrNr:m:1:1349778030:235A00C598F436A0F726BFF2040D9551:r)** Marco Rubio
P.S. Time is running out. Tonight I'm completing my final preparations for tomorrow's debate, and I need to know I have your support. **In fact, I 've asked my Campaign Manager to send me an updated list of supporters tonight so I can review it before I hit the hay. I hope I'll see your name on that list.**
---
| | [**> >>> CHIP IN $24 <<<<<**
**dpwillis67@gmail.com** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46099928:Jkc75KrNr:m:1:1349778030:235A00C598F436A0F726BFF2040D9551:r)
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---
|

name: Team Van Hollen
subject: Re: unacceptable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Did you see Chris's email? This issue is too important to ignore. **[Please stand with him today.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91cee/70cdc2ba/47c442bf/39656a1/1491590636/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-with-chris-for-flint-?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+stand+with+him+today&utm_campaign=em12616&source=em12616")**

Begin forwarded message:

| | Friend,

In America the air you breathe and the water you drink should not depend on your income, race or ethnicity.

But this is too often the case, as we have seen tragically in the drinking water crisis in Flint Michigan.

**[Join me in supporting Rep. Elijah Cummings and Oversight Dems in demanding that those responsible for the tragedy in Flint testify and be held accountable.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91cee/70cdc2ba/47c442bf/39656be/1491590636/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-with-chris-for-flint-?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Join+me+in+supporting+Rep+Elijah+Cumming&utm_campaign=em12616&source=em12616")**

Environmental Injustice = Injustice.

It is unacceptable and cannot be permitted to go unaddressed.

Chris
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91cee/70cdc2ba/47c442bf/39656bf/1491590636/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em12616&source=em12616") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Carly Fiorina
subject: Big numbers in New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARLY FOR PRESIDENT
body:
| | | | We're surging, but the political class is rigging the game.
---
---
| | | [](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/1SR6OiSSJAwkup9OYwjDU8)
---
| | |
## Friend,
## ****If you ever had any doubt that the game is rigged, consider what's going to go on at Saturday night's debate.

| | [ FIGHT BACK WITH ME ](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/1SRikEbY3PnwAyVV5ZpSQ5 "DONATE NOW")
---
| Even though this **latest poll in New Hampshire shows me in 6th place** --which, even by ABC's own flawed criteria, means I've earned my place on that stage--**they still refuse to let me debate.** [](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/1SRFnkO8Ij5UMSu7kVCmHZ) Party bosses are terrified that voters might nominate a principled conservative--instead of one of their establishment favorites. And the mainstream media is terrified a conservative nominee will beat Hillary Clinton this fall. That's why they're doing all they can to keep me off that stage. That's why they're doing their best to convince you this race is already over--and that your vote no longer matters. You and I both know that's not true. But we must fight back together if we're going to beat them at their own rigged game. **Will you stand with me, to give American voters the fair fight we deserve?** [**Please pitch in $13 to keep us fighting as hard as we can --and make sure voters get to hear from every voice in this race.**](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/1SRQTG7e2xX6T2gdsoIBDW) Thanks, **Carly**

---
| [ DONATE $13 NOW ](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/1SS2q1qjmMOiZc2jzROQzT "DONATE NOW")
---

---
| | |
##### PAID FOR BY CARLY FOR PRESIDENT
**[Unsubscribe](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/u/127VSVlDLkBBPi)**
---
clean_body: | | | | We're surging, but the political class is rigging the game. | | | | | | Friend, **If you ever had any doubt that the game is rigged, consider what's going to go on at Saturday night's debate. | | "DONATE NOW" | Even though this latest poll in New Hampshire shows me in 6th place --which, even by ABC's own flawed criteria, means I've earned my place on that stage--they still refuse to let me debate. Party bosses are terrified that voters might nominate a principled conservative--instead of one of their establishment favorites. And the mainstream media is terrified a conservative nominee will beat Hillary Clinton this fall. That's why they're doing all they can to keep me off that stage. That's why they're doing their best to convince you this race is already over--and that your vote no longer matters. You and I both know that's not true. But we must fight back together if we're going to beat them at their own rigged game. Will you stand with me, to give American voters the fair fight we deserve? Thanks, Carly | "DONATE NOW" | | | PAID FOR BY CARLY FOR PRESIDENT **

name: Marlon Marshall, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Got 10 minutes to help Hillary win? Add your name:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
Do you want Hillary to win? | Friend --

There's no part of a campaign I love more than Get Out The Vote -- or GOTV. In the final few days before an election, you turn the intensity WAY UP to turn out as many voters as possible to help your candidate win. And you find out what your team's really made of as you try.

We know that Bernie's campaign is raising more money than ours, and he's outspending us on TV in New Hampshire by an even wider margin than he did in Iowa. With the race this tight, it's more important than ever that we reach as many voters as possible before New Hampshire heads to the polls this Tuesday.

**[Will you join our GOTV for HRC team? Add your name to sign up, and I'll be in touch with easy, specific ways you can help fight for Hillary in New Hampshire and beyond.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQ2NTg2MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMDM4NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I know that sometimes it can be a little intimidating to root for Hillary on Twitter and Facebook. But you're not alone -- this whole team's got your back. Let's make sure the folks who are going to cast their ballots in New Hampshire feel us rooting for them, too.

**So let's go! Please believe that we're going to make a difference to win this nomination for Hillary, and we need your help to do it:** | [ | [**I want to help**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQ2NTg2MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMDM4NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQ2NTg2MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMDM4NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Marlon

Marlon Marshall
Director of State and Political Engagement
Hillary for America

**Chip in $1 to stand with Hillary before the New Hampshire primary:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQ2NTg2MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMDM4NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQ2NTg2MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMDM4NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjQ2NTg2MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMDM4NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQ2NTg2MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMDM4NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjQ2NTg2MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMDM4NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQ2NTg2MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMDM4NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQ2NTg2MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMDM4NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQ2NTg2MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMDM4NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ2NTg2MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMDM4NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQ2NTg2MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMDM4NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQ2NTg2MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMDM4NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQ2NTg2MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMDM4NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
